Examples
========

Smoke-test style construction
-----------------------------

The following example mirrors the block-construction style you can use later in a flowsheet.

.. code-block:: python

   import numpy as np
   from asm2dmodel import asm2d, combiner, carboncombiner, metalcombiner, hyddelay, settler1d

Notes
-----

Use the actual parameter vector sizes and state vectors from your validated package build.
